## ⚠️ Please Do Not Publicly Disclose

If you have found a security vulnerability, **please do NOT open a public issue**.
Instead, follow our [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md) and report it privately.

We will respond within 48 hours and work with you on a coordinated disclosure.

---

**This template is provided for context only.** Real security reports should
follow the private disclosure process.
